name: Sparinvest INDEX Globale Akt Min Risiko KL
summary: Sparinvest INDEX Globale Akt Min Risiko KL is an investment fund based in Denmark that aims to track the performance of global equities while minimizing risk. The fund invests in a diversified portfolio of global stocks, seeking to provide investors with stable returns. The fund is managed by Sparinvest and is domiciled in Denmark.
